comment: Bucket declarations shared by the application (buckets.ts) and the provisioning script. Inert data on purpose: both consume this file directly, so provisioning and runtime cannot disagree about which buckets exist or which are public. fileSizeLimit is bytes; Supabase enforces a project-wide 50 MB ceiling on the current plan and rejects any bucket declaring more.

buckets.name: blogs
buckets.description: Article cover images and in-body figures.

buckets.name: brochures
buckets.description: Project brochures. Lead-gated — served via signed URL only.

buckets.name: master-plans
buckets.description: Site master plans and layout drawings.

buckets.name: videos
buckets.description: Walkthroughs and drone footage. Longer films belong on a streaming host with only the embed URL stored.

buckets.name: documents
buckets.description: RERA certificates, approvals and legal documents.

buckets.name: company
buckets.description: Logos, leadership portraits and office photography.

buckets.name: careers
buckets.description: Candidate résumés. Personal data — private, retention-limited.
